narrative:
Orange City Sd city school district has 12,542 registered voters, with 54.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 14.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 30.4%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 15.7 percentage points. Registration is trending redder in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean +12.0% D−R vs +14.8% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
